---
name: implement-task
description: Implement a development task using relevant skills and project requirements.
---

# Implement Task Prompt

Please implement the requested task using the appropriate technologies and project structure.

- Identify the target area (client, server, integration).
- Use related skills such as `cpp`, `cmake`, `spring`, `docker`, `opencv`, `mediamtx`, `rest`, or `onnx`.
- Follow requirements from `requirements-guideline`.
- Keep changes aligned with existing repository ownership and architecture.
